languages.original_text: "The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."

languages.text: "Алые краски сменяются черными, глубокими, точно бездонный провал. То, что говорит Ирлиэт... поразительно точное описание того, что вижу я".
"The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."
languages.original_text: "Алые краски сменяются черными, глубокими, точно бездонный провал. То, что говорит Ирлиэт... поразительно точное описание того, что вижу я".

traits.locale_text: "The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."
"The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."
"The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."

languages.text: 「赤みがかった色合いは、深い黒、底知れぬ闇に変わりました。ユリエットが言ったこと…それは、私が見ているもの、驚くほど正確な描写です」
languages.original_text: "The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."

traits.locale_text: 「赤みがかった色合いは、深い黒、底知れぬ闇に変わりました。ユリエットが言った…それは、私が見ているもの、驚くほど正確な描写です」

languages.text: « Les nuances écarlates ont été remplacées par des teintes d'un noir profond comme un gouffre sans fond. Ce qu'Yrliet vient de dire... décrit étonnamment bien ce que je vois. »
languages.original_text: "The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."

traits.locale_text: « Les nuances écarlates ont été remplacées par des teintes d'un noir profond comme un gouffre sans fond. Ce qu'Yrliet vient de dire... décrit étonnamment bien ce que je vois. »

languages.text: "Die purpurnen Schatten wurden durch tiefschwarze Töne ersetzt, die einer bodenlosen Grube gleichen. Was Yrliet gesagt hat ... ist eine erschreckend genaue Beschreibung dessen, was ich sehe."
languages.original_text: "The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."

traits.locale_text: "Die purpurnen Schatten wurden durch tiefschwarze Töne ersetzt, die einer bodenlosen Grube gleichen. Was Yrliet gesagt hat ... ist eine erschreckend genaue Beschreibung dessen, was ich sehe."

languages.text: "Kızıl gölgelerin yerini siyah, derin tonlar aldı. Aynı dipsiz bir kuyu gibi. Yrliet'in söyledikleri... Gördüklerimin çarpıcı derecede doğru bir tasviri."
languages.original_text: "The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."

traits.locale_text: "Kızıl gölgelerin yerini siyah, derin tonlar aldı. Aynı dipsiz bir kuyu gibi. Yrliet'in söyledikleri... Gördüklerimin çarpıcı derecede doğru bir tasviri."

languages.text: «Los tonos escarlata han dado paso a un negro intenso, como si mirase a un pozo sin fondo. Lo que ha dicho Yrliet... es una descripción increíblemente atinada de lo que veo».
languages.original_text: "The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."

traits.locale_text: «Los tonos escarlata han dado paso a un negro intenso, como si mirase a un pozo sin fondo. Lo que ha dicho Yrliet... es una descripción increíblemente atinada de lo que veo».

languages.text: “猩红的色调已被漆黑深邃的色调取代，如同无底深渊。伊莉耶特所说的……正是我所目睹景象的精确描绘。”
languages.original_text: "The scarlet shades have been replaced by black, deep hues, like a bottomless pit. What Yrliet said... is a strikingly accurate description of what I see."
